nodes.name: backfill_predictions.py
nodes.summary: Backfills prediction records for completed games that lack predictions, enabling historical comparison features (EPIC-010).

nodes.name: backfill_predictions
nodes.summary: Iterates all completed games for a season and calls create_and_store_prediction for any game missing a prediction record.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point that opens a DB session and runs backfill_predictions for the 2025 season.

nodes.name: generate_all_predictions.py
nodes.summary: Generates and persists predictions for all upcoming games (not just next week), supporting playoff and special-case scenarios.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Parses CLI args, resolves season via CFBDClient if not provided, calls generate_predictions with next_week=False, and saves all predictions to the DB.

nodes.name: generate_predictions.py
nodes.summary: Generates and persists predictions for the upcoming week's games after deployment.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Calls generate_predictions for next-week games and saves resulting Prediction records to the database.

nodes.name: generate_ranking_comparison_report.py
nodes.summary: Generates a before/after markdown report comparing rankings pre- and post-implementation of the quarter-weighted ELO algorithm.

nodes.name: RankingComparisonReport
nodes.summary: Orchestrates capturing current rankings, recalculating from scratch with the new algorithm, and producing a markdown comparison report with top-25 changes and biggest movers.

nodes.name: capture_current_rankings
nodes.summary: Queries all teams ordered by ELO rating and returns a ranked list of (rank, name, rating) tuples.

nodes.name: recalculate_rankings_from_scratch
nodes.summary: Resets all team ratings to preseason values then reprocesses every game in chronological order via RankingService.

nodes.name: generate_comparison_report
nodes.summary: Writes a markdown report with top-25 rank changes, biggest movers, algorithm impact analysis, and garbage-time detection examples.

nodes.name: start_new_season.py
nodes.summary: Season initialization script that archives the previous season, creates a new Season record, resets team ELO ratings to preseason values, and saves preseason rankings (EPIC-024).

nodes.name: validate_new_season
nodes.summary: Validates that the target season does not already exist in the database before initialization.

nodes.name: archive_previous_season
nodes.summary: Sets the previous season's is_active flag to False to archive it.

nodes.name: create_new_season
nodes.summary: Creates a new Season record with week=1 and is_active=True.

nodes.name: reset_team_ratings
nodes.summary: Calls RankingService.calculate_preseason_rating for every team and persists the results as elo_rating and initial_rating.

nodes.name: save_preseason_rankings
nodes.summary: Writes week=0 RankingHistory entries for all teams as preseason ranking snapshots.

nodes.name: validate_season_data
nodes.summary: Post-initialization validation checking season existence, absence of existing games, and presence of preseason rankings.

nodes.name: ranking_service.py
nodes.summary: Core domain logic implementing the Modified ELO ranking algorithm with preseason factors, progressive K-factor, garbage time detection, SOS calculation, prediction generation, and accuracy tracking.

nodes.name: RankingService
nodes.summary: Main service class providing Modified ELO ranking with preseason initialization, progressive K-factor (64→48→32), quarter-weighted margin-of-victory with garbage time detection, conference multipliers, SOS calculation, and weekly ranking snapshots.

nodes.name: get_k_factor
nodes.summary: Returns the progressive K-factor for a given week: 64 for weeks 1-4, 48 for weeks 5-8, and 32 for week 9+ (EPIC-027).

nodes.name: _calculate_preseason_bonuses
nodes.summary: Computes individual preseason bonus components (base, recruiting, transfer portal, returning production, position strength) for use in rating initialization and the preseason simulator endpoint.

nodes.name: calculate_preseason_rating
nodes.summary: Calculates a team's preseason ELO rating by summing bonus components and optionally blending with previous season ELO using configurable regression (EPIC-030).

nodes.name: _calculate_position_strength_bonus
nodes.summary: Feature-flagged calculation of a position group strength bonus from player recruiting data; gracefully returns 0.0 when disabled or on error.

nodes.name: initialize_team_rating
nodes.summary: Sets a team's elo_rating and initial_rating to the calculated preseason rating and commits to DB.

nodes.name: _get_previous_season_elo
nodes.summary: Retrieves a team's final ELO from the previous season via ranking_history, preferring the week=999 postseason sentinel over the last regular-season entry.

nodes.name: save_final_season_snapshot
nodes.summary: Writes idempotent week=999 sentinel entries to ranking_history capturing each team's true postseason-final ELO before the next preseason reset (EPIC-030).

nodes.name: get_preseason_components
nodes.summary: Returns raw preseason bonus component data for all FBS teams, used by the preseason simulator endpoint for client-side recalculation (EPIC-032).

nodes.name: calculate_expected_score
nodes.summary: Computes the standard ELO expected win probability for team A against team B using the logistic formula.

nodes.name: calculate_mov_multiplier
nodes.summary: Calculates a logarithmic margin-of-victory multiplier for ELO adjustments, capped at MAX_MOV_MULTIPLIER (2.5).

nodes.name: calculate_quarter_weighted_mov
nodes.summary: Calculates quarter-by-quarter MOV multiplier, applying 0.25 weight to Q4 scoring when game enters garbage time (differential > 21 after Q3) per EPIC-021.

nodes.name: get_conference_multiplier
nodes.summary: Returns winner/loser ELO change multipliers based on conference tier matchup (FBS vs FCS, P5 vs G5, same tier).

nodes.name: process_game
nodes.summary: Validates and processes a completed game: applies home field advantage, computes ELO changes using progressive K-factor and MOV multiplier, updates team ratings and records, evaluates prediction accuracy, and commits to DB.

nodes.name: get_season_record
nodes.summary: Queries the games table for season-specific win/loss counts for a team, replacing cumulative team-table records (EPIC-024).

nodes.name: calculate_sos
nodes.summary: Calculates strength of schedule as the average ELO rating of all opponents faced in processed, rankings-eligible games for a season.

nodes.name: get_current_rankings
nodes.summary: Returns season-specific rankings from ranking_history for the current week, enabling accurate historical season browsing (EPIC-024).

nodes.name: save_weekly_rankings
nodes.summary: Persists current team ELO ratings, season records, and SOS values to ranking_history for a given week, with idempotent upsert behavior.

nodes.name: reset_season
nodes.summary: Resets all team ELO ratings to recalculated preseason values and zeroes win/loss records for a fresh season start.

nodes.name: generate_predictions
nodes.summary: Standalone function that queries unprocessed games (optionally filtered by week/team/season) and returns prediction dictionaries with win probabilities and estimated scores.

nodes.name: _calculate_game_prediction
nodes.summary: Calculates win probabilities and predicted scores for a single game using ELO ratings and home field advantage.

nodes.name: _validate_prediction_teams
nodes.summary: Validates that both home and away teams exist and have positive ELO ratings before generating a prediction.

nodes.name: create_and_store_prediction
nodes.summary: Creates and persists a Prediction record for a future game using current ELO ratings, with duplicate guard (EPIC-009).

nodes.name: evaluate_prediction_accuracy
nodes.summary: Updates the was_correct flag on an existing Prediction record by comparing the predicted winner to the actual game winner (EPIC-009).

nodes.name: get_overall_prediction_accuracy
nodes.summary: Computes aggregate prediction accuracy statistics (total, evaluated, correct, percentage) optionally filtered by season (EPIC-009).

nodes.name: get_team_prediction_accuracy
nodes.summary: Computes per-team prediction accuracy statistics including breakdowns as favorite vs underdog (EPIC-009).

nodes.name: validate_week
nodes.summary: Validates that a week number falls within the acceptable range (0-15) for prediction generation.

nodes.name: validate_team_for_prediction
nodes.summary: Validates that a team exists and has a positive ELO rating suitable for prediction.

nodes.name: validate_predicted_score
nodes.summary: Clamps a predicted score to the valid range [0, 150].

nodes.name: validate_game_for_prediction
nodes.summary: Validates a game is eligible for prediction (unprocessed, valid week range).

nodes.name: reprocess_season.py
nodes.summary: Utility that resets and fully reprocesses all ranked games for a season to correct ELO imbalances, with dry-run support and before/after verification.

nodes.name: check_season_exists
nodes.summary: Verifies the target season record exists in the database before proceeding.

nodes.name: analyze_current_state
nodes.summary: Reports total, processed, and excluded game counts and detects ELO imbalances (home+away rating changes not summing to zero).

nodes.name: reset_season_data
nodes.summary: Resets all non-excluded games to unprocessed state and restores team ratings to initial_rating with zeroed records.

nodes.name: reprocess_season
nodes.summary: Instantiates RankingService and calls process_game on all unprocessed games in chronological order.

nodes.name: verify_reprocessing
nodes.summary: Confirms all games were processed and no ELO imbalances remain after reprocessing.

nodes.name: save_final_season_snapshot.py
nodes.summary: Utility that captures postseason-final ELO ratings into ranking_history as week=999 sentinel entries before the next preseason reset (EPIC-030).

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point that previews the top 10 teams by ELO, then calls RankingService.save_final_season_snapshot to persist the week=999 snapshot.

nodes.name: seed_data.py
nodes.summary: Seeds the database with sample teams (P5, G5, FCS) and two weeks of games for the 2024 season, initializing ratings and processing games via RankingService.

nodes.name: seed_database
nodes.summary: Resets the DB, creates 33 sample teams across conferences, processes two weeks of games through RankingService, and saves ranking history for weeks 1-2.
